rows.label: tlk70000025_03_msg0001
rows.name: Aw man, I'm actually tearing up...

rows.label: tlk70000025_03_msg0002
rows.name:
Just seeing you guys stand up to
that Holy Grail's cronies when
they were wrecking up the town..

rows.label: tlk70000025_03_msg0003
rows.name:
You're at least as rad as
the Iiran army. Nah, you're
even better, man!

rows.label: tlk70000025_03_msg0004
rows.name:
I'm still just a civilian, but
someday I'll join Iira's army
and help people like you do!
